# directoryURLs

**Instance Property**

The directories managed by this extension.

## Declaration

```swift
var directoryURLs: Set<URL>! { get set }
```

## Discussion

The extension receives [doc://com.apple.Finder-Sync/documentation/FinderSync/FIFinderSyncProtocol/beginObservingDirectory(at:)] and [doc://com.apple.Finder-Sync/documentation/FinderSync/FIFinderSyncProtocol/endObservingDirectory(at:)] messages for every directory in this set and for all of their subdirectories.

Always set `directoryURLs` when the extension starts. If there are no directories to watch, set `directoryURLs` to an empty set.

## Managing the Finder Sync Controller

- **default()**: Returns the shared Finder Sync controller object.
- **selectedItemURLs()**: Returns an array of selected items.
- **setBadgeIdentifier(_:for:)**: Sets the badge for a file or directory.
- **setBadgeImage(_:label:forBadgeIdentifier:)**: Sets the badge image and label for the given ID.
- **targetedURL()**: Returns the URL of the Finder’s current target.
